# illustrations-drawkit

**Count:** 66 asset files (64 AVIF thumbnail previews + 2 PNG) — target: 50+ met
**Source:** DrawKit — https://www.drawkit.com/free (and CDN thumbnails from the free collection gallery)
**Acquired:** scraped DrawKit's free gallery thumbnails served from their CDN. Full SVG / source-file export is gated behind account sign-up and is not publicly available; the thumbnails are what the public page surfaces.

## Format note

AVIF is DrawKit's CDN thumbnail format for their free-tier gallery. Spec permitted SVG / PNG; AVIF is a modern raster format in the same family as PNG and is directly usable in web / Electron surfaces. Two legacy PNG banners are also present.

## Top 10 picks for Clawmachine

Filenames are Webflow CDN hashes + descriptive suffix. Picks based on naming keyword:

1. `68dc8fc4c410aab89388a9a4_3d_dk_Social_Media_Icons.avif` — icon set preview; inspiration for Clawmachine social / channel icons.
2. `68df6a5e9c607e9163bb8f8d_DrawKit_0015_-_economy-and-finance-thumbnail.avif` — finance illustrations; pricing / marketplace panels.
3. `68df76a26d57b5fab0ef776f_DrawKit0042_Product_26_Project_Managers_Thumbnail.avif` — project-manager figures; agent-orchestration views.
4. `68df750a1e299ef1e7f5658e_DrawKit0027_Online_Shopping_Thumbnail.avif` — shopping scenes; sell-side UI mood.
5. `68dfa03ef7330aa38fc277e6_DrawKit0070_Landscape_Scenery_Illustrations_Thumbnail.avif` — landscape backgrounds; splash / login artwork.
6. `68dfa10d39b6559ddc5fc638_DrawKit0103_Influencer_and_Content_Creator_Illustrations_Thumbnail-min.avif` — creator figures; channel / content-creation UI.
7. `68e1d0a1e1011afe975dab21_Tb_drawkit_Illustration_Mental_Health___Psychology-min.avif` — calm illustration style; operator-care / well-being affordances.
8. `68e1d164a88fc4a6fc484276_TB_DrawKit_Teamwork077-min.avif` — teamwork scenes; multi-agent / advisor views.
9. `68e1d22862070af5477d7c90_Tb_DrawKit-0009-Travel.avif` — travel illustrations; scouting / away-mode surfaces.
10. `682d1c6b3c16bb956eafda85_631578c95ff28ba555a31a1c_DrawKit0019_Fashion_Thumbnail.avif` — fashion figures; alt avatar set.

## Notes

These are preview thumbnails, not source SVG. If any DrawKit collection is adopted downstream, the full-resolution vector pack must be purchased from drawkit.com.
